title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop app that integrates Claude with local file access, persistent memory, connectors, skills, projects, and scheduled tasks for productivity automation. The video covers seven core capabilities with examples of real-world workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
